query:
-- For each shift, compute: total cap slots available vs total pending requests
-- Cap = 8 per shift per day. Count days with any requests.
WITH shift_day AS (
  SELECT 
    e.shift,
    rd.date,
    COUNT(DISTINCT r.id) AS requests
  FROM request_dates rd
  JOIN requests r ON rd.request_id = r.id
  JOIN employees e ON r.employee_id = e.id
  WHERE r.request_type = 'vacation' AND r.status = 'pending'
    AND (e.category != 'ancillary' OR e.category IS NULL)
    AND e.is_active = 1
  GROUP BY e.shift, rd.date
)
SELECT 
  shift,
  COUNT(*) AS days_with_requests,
  SUM(requests) AS total_requests,
  SUM(LEAST(requests, 8)) AS requests_within_cap,
  SUM(GREATEST(requests - 8, 0)) AS requests_over_cap,
  ROUND(100.0 * SUM(LEAST(requests, 8)) / (COUNT(*) * 8), 1) AS cap_utilization_pct,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN requests > 8 THEN 1 END) AS oversubscribed_days,
  ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(CASE WHEN requests > 8 THEN 1 END) / COUNT(*), 1) AS pct_days_oversubscribed
FROM shift_day
GROUP BY shift
ORDER BY shift;

-- For each shift, compute: total cap slots available vs total pending requests
-- Cap = 8 per shift per day. Count days with any requests.
WITH shift_day AS (
  SELECT 
    e.shift,
    rd.date,
    COUNT(DISTINCT r.id) AS requests
  FROM request_dates rd
  JOIN requests r ON rd.request_id = r.id
  JOIN employees e ON r.employee_id = e.id
  WHERE r.request_type = 'vacation' AND r.status = 'pending'
    AND (e.category != 'ancillary' OR e.category IS NULL)
    AND e.is_active = 1
  GROUP BY e.shift, rd.date
)
SELECT 
  shift,
  COUNT(*) AS days_with_requests,
  SUM(requests) AS total_requests,
  SUM(LEAST(requests, 8)) AS requests_within_cap,
  SUM(GREATEST(requests - 8, 0)) AS requests_over_cap,
  ROUND(100.0 * SUM(LEAST(requests, 8)) / (COUNT(*) * 8), 1) AS cap_utilization_pct,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN requests > 8 THEN 1 END) AS oversubscribed_days,
  ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(CASE WHEN requests > 8 THEN 1 END) / COUNT(*), 1) AS pct_days_oversubscribed
FROM shift_day
GROUP BY shift
ORDER BY shift;
